summary: This release improves citation quality, restores search date filtering, ensures follow-up suggestions load reliably, and fixes several user interface bugs.

entries.title: Date-filtered searches now work correctly
entries.description: Temporal search queries, such as "last 6 months" or "since 2026," once again properly filter search results based on the publication date instead of returning the entire unfiltered document set.

entries.title: Clearer notifications for empty filtered searches
entries.description: When a search filtered by product or date finds no matching results, the assistant now clearly notifies you that it has expanded the search to a broader, unfiltered set of documents.

entries.title: Cleaner and more readable citation previews
entries.description: The citation side panel now displays the actual substantive text of the source documents rather than showing redundant structural headers and URL paths.

entries.title: Duplicated documentation versions are now collapsed
entries.description: When a search returns multiple versions of the same documentation topic (e.g., across different software versions), the citation panel collapses them into a single entry pointing to the latest version to reduce noise.

entries.title: Scrollbar restored for long citation lists
entries.description: Resolved an issue where users on smaller screens could not scroll down to view more than six sources in the citation panel.

entries.title: Follow-up question chips load reliably
entries.description: Suggested follow-up questions now automatically retry loading if rate limits are hit, ensuring they consistently appear beneath responses even during rapid search sessions.

entries.title: Temporary latency when generating responses
entries.description: Responses currently take between 18 to 28 seconds to fully generate. Work is underway to introduce streaming responses to display text progressively.

entries.title: Version-specific filtering unavailable for XSIAM
entries.description: Because Cortex XSIAM documentation is organized by date rather than version numbers, queries specifying XSIAM versions will search all XSIAM documents and display a scope notice.

entries.title: Limited documentation coverage for Cortex AgentiX
entries.description: As Cortex AgentiX is a newly launched platform, its documentation coverage is currently limited. Some queries may fall back to general XSOAR documentation.
